content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Revelation", "mana_cost": "{3}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Draw three cards, then discard two cards.
• Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
• Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge comes to those who seek it in all its forms.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal blue sorcery that offers different types of card selection and advantage. The first mode is immediate card selection with filtering, the second is deep library manipulation, and the third provides recursion. Each mode is appropriately costed for a 4-mana rare effect, giving players meaningful choices based on game state."}, {"name": "Withering Strike", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": ""Even the mightiest oak falls to the right blade in the right place." —Kethis, shadow assassin", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A straightforward black removal spell at common with a mana value restriction to keep it balanced. The restriction makes it unable to hit expensive threats while still being useful in the early-to-mid game. This follows black's color pie perfectly and uses clear targeting language."}, {"name": "Graveyard Scavenger", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Rogue", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, you may return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.
Whenever a creature dies, you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": "Death feeds the living, if you know where to look.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "An uncommon creature that combines graveyard recursion with incremental lifegain. The ETB provides immediate value by returning a small creature, while the death trigger provides ongoing benefit. The mana value restriction keeps the recursion balanced, and the lifegain fits black's secondary lifegain abilities."}, {"name": "Vorthak, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if an opponent has no creatures, that player loses 3 life and you draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "4", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "A mythic legendary demon that embodies black's philosophy of sacrifice and punishment. The ETB forces sacrifice, the upkeep trigger rewards controlling the board by punishing creatureless opponents. Flying and 4/4 stats for 5 mana make it a reasonable threat. The design encourages building around creature removal and board control."}, {"name": "Scorching Bolt", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": "Lightning doesn't discriminate between the guilty and the unlucky.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A clean, efficient red burn spell at common. 3 damage for 2 mana with full flexibility (any target) is the standard rate for common burn spells. The 'any target' wording is the current template for spells that can hit creatures, planeswalkers, or players, making it versatile for both removal and direct damage."}]}
